steps.t: Barrels of iron goods from the farmers of Westfold can be found outside the keep of the Hornburg, near Aragorn. Aragorn has asked you to sort through …
You can use one of the mats near Aragorn to sort the iron goods contributed by the farmers of Westfold.
You can use one of the mats near Aragorn to sort the iron goods contributed by the farmers of Westfold.
You can use one of the mats near Aragorn to sort the iron goods contributed by the farmers of Westfold.
Éomer is outside the keep of the Hornburg.
Éomer has asked you to carry one of the nearby training dummies up to the wall by Legolas, the better to draw fire away from the defenders.
Legolas is atop the wall. You have carried a training dummy to the top of the wall and Legolas has caught your eye.
Corudan has gone down to the Dike, beyond the walls of the Hornburg. Legolas told you that Corudan planned to scout the armies of Saruman, and you sho…
Gamling is at Helm's Dike. There is always work to be done to get ready for battle, and Gamling will tell you what he needs.
Gamling has asked you to carry a barrel of iron goods from Helm's Dike to Aragorn outside the keep of the Hornburg.
Aragorn is outside the keep of the Hornburg, and wishes to speak with you.
